name: skyreels-a2
paperTitle: SkyReels-A2: Compose Anything in Video with ID-Preserving Diffusion
content:
## Introduction

Diffusion process conditioned on identity embeddings ensures consistent character representation while allowing scene variation. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

Diffusion process conditioned on identity embeddings ensures consistent character representation while allowing scene variation.

